Explains reschedule is rentals' job, does not claim to have moved bk_1001.
Reads hasOpenClaim=true, refuses release citing open claim, promises no deposit back.

Surfaces 1000/3000 held, 2000 shortfall, booking not returned, declines release, invents nothing.
